title: Ranch — grocery list with vocabulary words (Aug 2020)
html:
TL;DR

  • A grocery + household-supply list captured Aug 2020 (mid-COVID, pre-senior-year), titled "Ranch" — likely the Grants Pass family house code-name, or a grocery destination.
  • The list is interrupted halfway through by four vocabulary words and a phone number — "Exacerbate / Pragmatic / Theadores success quote / Idolatry" — proof that Yahir's was already operational at age 17.
  • The vocab list reads like SAT-prep + a half-remembered Theodore Roosevelt quote — same self-improvement pattern as the sports cards mentor note from a month later. He's stacking inputs.
  • Recurring grocery items: tapatío, jicama, serrano, pink lentils, masaroka — the family-Mexican-pantry signal. "Dad's coffee pods" is an affectionate detail.
  • One redacted phone number (10 digits, 541 area code) — consistent with the family's local-network shape but redacted in this summary as it's not a public number.

Key quotes / fragments

"Exacerbate / Pragmatic / Theadores success quote / Idolatry"

"Dad's coffe pods" / "Triple shit" / "Marucha" / "Nutsh" / "Chicalostr milk"

"Shallots / Serrano / Pink lentils"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Directly substantiates the concept page — vocab + groceries + a phone number in a single note IS the canonical junk-drawer shape.
  • The Mexican-pantry stack (tapatío, jicama, serranos, masaroka, pink lentils) confirms Iracema's cooking world before Yahir leaves for OSU.
  • Vocabulary collection at 17 is a small but consistent thread of self-betterment that runs through 2020 09 23 sports cards mentor questions and 2020 09 23 quick flips or long term cards — same week-of-life ambition stack.
  • "Theadores success quote" — possibly Theodore Roosevelt's "Do what you can, with what you have, where you are" — a quote Yahir has clearly absorbed into his own grants pass teen era mental furniture (he names "do what you can with what you got" as a guiding line in later journals).

Connections / wikilinks

iracema vargas · yahir family · grants pass or · grants pass teen era · 2020 09 23 sports cards mentor questions · covid pandemic era

Privacy

One 10-digit phone number redacted from this summary (raw note retains it).
